Video.summary: Lifeguards respond to a suspected heart attack. Two green whistles are used for a dislocated shoulder.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 03

Video.summary: New Years brings Snoop Dogg, rips rescues, a girl crying wolf and a helicopter search for a missing swimmer.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 02

Video.summary: A young boy tragically drowns. Lifeguard Corey rescues Iggy who has swallowed a large amount of water.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 01

Video.summary: A man breaks his leg, Maxi uses a tracking device to locate a thief and a bunch of school kids run wild.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 12

Video.summary: A young boy suffers a spinal injury on his birthday. Lifeguards bring their kids to Bondi.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 07

Video.summary: When surfer Damo is treated for a spinal injury, lifeguards fear the worst.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 07

Video.summary: The biggest mass rescue in years sees Bondi Beach closed. Nicola joins the team and leads a mass rescue.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 02

Video.summary: A Japanese tourist drowns just metres from lifeguards trying to save him. Beardy races to 2 Nepalese men.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 01

Video.summary: Kerrbox disrupts Harries' grand plans to propose to his girlfriend, putting blue paint in his spray tan.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 10

Video.summary: Jesse fractures his spine and Jake rescues a beginner surfer being smashed against cliffs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 13

Video.summary: Lifeguards rescue a surfer being smashed against cliffs. Drunk Irishmen dance in tutus and frolic in the nude.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 05

Video.summary: Lifeguards attend a number of mass rescues. Trainee Harrison is tasked with counting the people on the beach.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 11

Video.summary: Lifeguards face frustrating distractions involving lost gear, wayward children, ball games, and somersaults
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 06

Video.summary: A man comes to lifeguards with a deep stab wound. A man is brought to shore with no feeling in his lower body.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 04

Video.summary: A man assaults women in the surf. Lifeguards take part in a 30 day fitness and diet challenge.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 12

Video.summary: Lifeguards attend a deep water spinal rescue, and try catch a rat that’s been eating cables in their buggies.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 11

Video.summary: Lfeguards treat an anaphylactic shock patient for the first time and perform a surprising Christmas rescue.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 03

Video.summary: Lifeguards play a final prank on Harrison. Nicola faces her fear of open water when a boat sinks off Bondi.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 13

Video.summary: Bluebottles swarm at Bondi, so Harries devises a magical treatment for the stings.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 08

Video.summary: Jack’s rescuing a boy in big swell and makes a bold call when they’re almost smashed onto rocks.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 10

Video.summary: Harries plays matchmaker for Singlets. Lifeguards save 7 people caught in two separate rips.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 04

Video.summary: Lifeguards assist a concussed boy who suffered a seizure, and a woman hit by a car. Karlie Kloss visits Bondi.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 05

Video.summary: Family members watch as lifeguards attempt to resuscitate two people from the same family.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 12

Video.summary: Bondi local body builder Dimitri breaks both legs falling down a cliff. A paddleboarder snaps her collar bone.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 08

Video.summary: Spotlights illuminate World Pride Beach Party with 15,010 revelers. Hoppo marks 30 years on the beach.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 11

Video.summary: Chappo makes a sprint to rescue a swimmer and Bagus keeps a nude photo shoot secret from the lifeguards.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 03

Video.summary: Lifeguards deal with a missing boy and two friends - one dislocates his hip, the other has a seizure.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 07

Video.summary: A young local suffers a serious skating accident. Festive spirit turns deadly with alcohol affected swimmers.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 05

Video.summary: Yatesy attempts to rescue an inexperienced surfer. After shark sightings, the lifeguards test new technology.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 11

Video.summary: A man is dragged unconscious from the water, no pulse and not breathing. Reidy and Beardy begin resuscitation.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 06

Video.summary: Nicola attempts to rescue a bodyboarder in his 70s. A tragic spinal injury leaves the lifeguards in shock.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 12

Video.summary: Cyclonic swell hits Bondi Beach with 12-foot waves. H lectures drunken youths. New drone technology is tested.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 10

Video.summary: New trainee Ryan struggles with the megaphone. Jethro hits it off with a pair of drag queens.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 01

Video.summary: Jesse, alone in the tower, can't assist a drowning man as all lifeguards are busy in the water.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 02

Video.summary: A Bondi local is found face down, unresponsive in the sand. Singlets is flocked by seagulls in the buggy.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 05

Video.summary: Maxi responds to a tunnel fire. Harrison and Jethro attend to a girl found facedown with no pulse.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 12

Video.summary: Students capture their own drowning on a GoPro. Maxi pursues a bag thief and Harries plays the bagpipes.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 11

Video.summary: Lifeguards deal with drug and alcohol affected masses. Nicola loses her cool with beach goers.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 06

Video.summary: Maxi risks his life to rescue two fishermen. Jethro rescues tourists from rips, then collapses on the beach.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 10

Video.summary: The Hare Krishnas visit Bondi. Maxi plays a Christmas prank. A scuba diver drowns at Ben Buckler.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 03

Video.summary: Bluebottles attack Bondi. Mouse handles a missing boy, a dislocated shoulder, and a drug overdose.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 09

Video.summary: A Bondi summer ends with the apprehension of perverts, bag thieves and an unexpected COVID lockdown.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 10

Video.summary: Christmas at Bondi overwhelms lifeguards. Jake and Jackson struggle with rescues, and Maxi makes a wrong move.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 03

Video.summary: A car falls onto a busy walking track and a pervert flees police. The Annual Lifeguard Race is on.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 05

Video.summary: Maxi juggles both lifeguarding and firefighting, as the other lifeguards face rescues with language barriers.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 02

Video.summary: Lifeguards investigate a floating object a kilometre offshore, Mario rescues a woman on an inflatable tomato.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 09

Video.summary: New Year's festivities turn dark with a teenage drug overdose and mass rescues.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 04

Video.summary: Chase mans the tower alone, and Dylan deals with a spinal incident. Off the beach, Hoppo apprehends a thief.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 01
